title: CC: Tweaked x Cobblemon
description: Adds some compatibility between CC: Tweaked and Cobblemon
body:
# CC: Tweaked x Cobblemon

A simple datapack focused on adding some functionality to CC: Tweaked so that it can interact with Cobblemon.

## Features
### Turtles
Turtles are able to harvest fully grown apricorns and berries.
- Use `.place()` with shears in the selected slot.
- Once sheared items can be collected as normal with `.suck()`
